metadata.title: Quick Double Kill After a Surprise Mid Peek in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this slick moment where a sudden mid peek nets two kills fast. Timing and quick aim made all the difference here. What’s your favorite angle to catch enemies off guard?

Got a clutch like this? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
